title: pistolochia × budensis
intro: Pistolochia × budensis, also known as the Hybrid Pistolochia or Bud Pistolochia, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Pistacia lentiscus and Pistacia terebinthus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds like terpenes, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pistolochia × budensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Pistolochia × budensis typically include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory problems.
